Lily.HEAD_DESC: Soft oval face, gentle brown eyes, short brown bob with side-swept bangs
Lily.OUTFIT_OR_MARKINGS: Cream oversized knit sweater, beige linen trousers, white socks
Lily.SIGNATURE_FEATURE: The cream knit sweater + brown bob combination

Panel_1.CORE_ACTION: Standing at kitchen counter, cracking an egg into a bowl
Panel_1.EXPRESSION: Focused, soft downward gaze at bowl
Panel_1.BG_ELEMENTS: White cabinets, wooden countertop, herb pots, sheer curtain

Panel_2.CORE_ACTION: Standing at window, gazing outside, one hand on sill
Panel_2.EXPRESSION: Calm, wistful, eyes unfocused on middle distance
Panel_2.BG_ELEMENTS: Sheer white curtain, herb pots, blurred outdoor greenery
Panel_2.SPATIAL_LINK: Same kitchen; counter from P1 blurred in background

Panel_3.CORE_ACTION: Seated at dining table, eating with a spoon
Panel_3.EXPRESSION: Relaxed, gentle gaze alternating between plate and book
Panel_3.LOCATION: Apartment dining area, adjacent to kitchen
Panel_3.BG_ELEMENTS: Wooden dining table, ceramic plate, open book, white mug
Panel_3.SPATIAL_LINK: Same apartment; kitchen from P1–2 faintly visible in BG
Panel_3.CARRIED_PROPS: Herb pots visible through background window

Ryan.HEAD_DESC: Angular jaw, short dark hair, light stubble, dark eyes
Ryan.OUTFIT_OR_MARKINGS: Navy blue commuter jacket, grey slim trousers, white sneakers, olive backpack
Ryan.SIGNATURE_FEATURE: The olive green backpack always on left shoulder

Panel_1.CORE_ACTION: Striding quickly along pavement toward a stopped bus
Panel_1.BG_ELEMENTS: Stopped city bus, streetlamp, distant buildings, pavement

Panel_2.CORE_ACTION: Stopped at open bus door, one foot on step, right hand gripping rail
Panel_2.EXPRESSION: Brief pause, eyes directed ahead with resolve
Panel_2.BG_ELEMENTS: Bus door frame, interior warm light spilling out, street behind
Panel_2.MOOD: Brief moment of resolve and transition
Panel_2.SPATIAL_LINK: Same bus from P1; Ryan has reached the door

Panel_3.CORE_ACTION: Seated inside bus, body angled toward window, backpack on lap
Panel_3.EXPRESSION: Calm outward gaze through window, settled
Panel_3.BG_ELEMENTS: Bus seat rows, window with passing cityscape, overhead rack
Panel_3.SPATIAL_LINK: Interior of same bus from P2
Panel_3.CARRIED_PROPS: Same olive backpack, now on lap

Dog.HEAD_DESC: Floppy ears, bright round eyes, open friendly expression
Dog.OUTFIT_OR_MARKINGS: No collar; distinctive fluffy golden tail
Dog.SIGNATURE_FEATURE: The golden-amber coat + white chest patch

Panel_1.CORE_ACTION: Sprinting at full gallop across open meadow
Panel_1.EXPRESSION: Ears back, tongue out, eyes bright — pure joyful speed
Panel_1.BG_ELEMENTS: Tall grass foreground, distant treeline, clear sky

Panel_2.CORE_ACTION: Low crouched run, eyes locked on a bouncing yellow tennis ball
Panel_2.EXPRESSION: Ears forward, intense focused gaze, mouth slightly open
Panel_2.BG_ELEMENTS: Yellow tennis ball in foreground trajectory, grass, open sky
Panel_2.SPATIAL_LINK: Same meadow; continuous chase from P1

Panel_3.CORE_ACTION: Trotting toward camera, yellow ball held in mouth
Panel_3.EXPRESSION: Ears up, tail raised and wagging, eyes bright and triumphant
Panel_3.BG_ELEMENTS: Same meadow grass, warm afternoon light, open sky
Panel_3.SPATIAL_LINK: Same meadow; Dog returning from direction of P2
Panel_3.CARRIED_PROPS: Yellow tennis ball (identical to Panel 2) in mouth
